chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1386 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 13.03.2025 Petitioner, Samira Mahamadi, is present in person. 1. Petitioner has grievance pursuant to the Sindh Sound System (Regulation) Act, 2015. We are assisted with sections 5, 6, 7 and 8 thereof, which provide for a mechanism in instances of infringement. While the petitioner remains at liberty to seek appropriate remedy, no case is made out for direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. Petition is found to be mis- conceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
